_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: The microglial cells in the slices were identified by transgenic EGFP labeling in WT and Nf1± mice intercrossed with MacGreen (Csfr1-EGFP) mice
details: Successfully enabled visualization of microglia in acute cortical slices for surveillance analysis using transgenic EGFP labeling
